name: list_live_flows
description: List all flows in a Power Platform environment

name: get_live_flow
description: Read the full flow definition (triggers, actions, parameters)

name: get_live_flow_runs
description: View recent run history with status and timing

name: get_live_flow_run_error
description: Get per-action error breakdown for a failed run

name: get_live_flow_run_action_outputs
description: Inspect inputs/outputs of any action, including loop iterations

name: get_live_flow_http_schema
description: Inspect the request/response schema of HTTP-triggered flows

name: get_live_flow_trigger_url
description: Get the signed callback URL for HTTP-triggered flows

name: trigger_live_flow
description: Trigger an HTTP-triggered flow with a JSON payload

name: update_live_flow
description: Create a new flow or update an existing definition

name: resubmit_live_flow_run
description: Replay a failed run using its original trigger data

name: cancel_live_flow_run
description: Cancel a currently running flow execution

name: add_live_flow_to_solution
description: Migrate a flow into a solution
